Latest news from the beIn SPORTS News room, previewing and reviewing developments and scores with contribution from around the world from beIN's reporters.
A  daily Special Interview related to an important issue of the day. The interview offers the background and insight into the issue chosen from the world of sport.
"Special Report" is a single long feature from one of beIN SPORTS News reporters that takes an alternative look at a subject from the world of sport.
Latest news from the beIn SPORTS News room, previewing and reviewing developments and scores with contribution from around the world from beIN's reporters.
"Al Hassila" provides a concise recap of the latest sports matches, highlighting key goals and noteworthy moments from around the world of sports.
Latest news from the beIn SPORTS News room, previewing and reviewing developments and scores with contribution from around the world from beIN's reporters.

On March 3, just 100 days will remain until the kickoff of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. To mark this significant milestone, beIN SPORTS will provide special coverage on the evening of March 2 starting 22:00 Doha Time. The FIFA World Cup 2026 will be exclusively broadcast on beIN.
Al Hassad is a nighltly studio from beIN Sports News that looks at the stories that have made the headlines in the world of sport and those stories that will be making the headlines tomorrow morning.

beIN SPORTS 3.desc_ar: Valencia have failed to win any of their last three LaLiga games against Osasuna, since a 0-1 victory at El Sadar in April 2024; it's their worst winless run against them in the competition since January 2012. beIN SPORTS 6.desc_ar: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

beIN SPORTS 6.desc_ar: Levante have won just two of their 11 LaLiga matches against Deportivo Alavés  - both of those came at home, while they have conceded at least one goal in all 11 encounters. Levante lost their last home game against Deportivo Alavés, 0-1 in June 2023 in the second leg of the promotion play-off final to LaLiga, having previously been unbeaten in their three prior home games against them at the Ciutat de Valencia.

beIN SPORTS 6.desc_ar: Valencia have failed to win any of their last three LaLiga games against Osasuna, since a 0-1 victory at El Sadar in April 2024; it's their worst winless run against them in the competition since January 2012. Osasuna have taken points in their last two visits to Mestalla in LaLiga  and could take points in three consecutive away games against Valencia for the first time in the competition's history.

beIN SPORTS 6.title_fr: Gérone vs Celta Vigo - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 26e journée
beIN SPORTS 6.desc_ar: Girona are unbeaten in their last six LaLiga matches against Celta de Vigo, their longest unbeaten streak against the Galician side in the competition. Girona have only lost one of their last five home matches in all competitions against Celta de Vigo, after losing three of the previous four at home against them.

beIN SPORTS 6.desc_ar: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

beIN SPORTS 6.title_fr: Valence vs Osasuna - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - Semaine
beIN SPORTS 6.desc_ar: Valencia have failed to win any of their last three LaLiga games against Osasuna, since a 0-1 victory at El Sadar in April 2024; it's their worst winless run against them in the competition since January 2012. Osasuna have taken points in their last two visits to Mestalla in LaLiga  and could take points in three consecutive away games against Valencia for the first time in the competition's history.

beIN SPORTS 6.desc_ar: Levante have won just two of their 11 LaLiga matches against Deportivo Alavés  - both of those came at home, while they have conceded at least one goal in all 11 encounters. Levante lost their last home game against Deportivo Alavés, 0-1 in June 2023 in the second leg of the promotion play-off final to LaLiga, having previously been unbeaten in their three prior home games against them at the Ciutat de Valencia.
